title: Simple Task List Generator
scenario: Create a simple task list template with space for tasks and notes. The template should include a header with the task list name and a list of tasks. The tasks should be numbered and include space for notes. The output should be a formatted text string.
constraints: Use a standard font and headings

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the task list meets the specified constraints.
Verify that the tasks are clear and specific.
Assess the overall formatting of the task list, including headings, spacing, and font choice.
